protein_name: Orphan receptor. Belongs to the G-protein coupled receptor 1 family. Expression restricted to nervous system and testis. Is also detected in several tumors types, most notably prostate cancer. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Protein type: GPCR, family 1; Membrane protein, integral; Membrane protein, multi-pass; Receptor, GPCR
raw_fields.Molecular Function: G protein-coupled receptor activity; odorant binding; olfactory receptor activity; protein binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: detection of chemical stimulus involved in sensory perception of smell; G protein-coupled receptor signaling pathway; signal transduction
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: Brain and testis restricted GPCR; BTR; G protein-coupled receptor 148; G protein-coupled receptor PGR6; G-protein coupled receptor PGR6; GP148; GPR148; PGR6; Probable G-protein coupled receptor 148
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 8.81 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
